name: Los Angeles LDC Inc
description_short: Los Angeles LDC Inc is a free credit assistance provider based in Inglewood, California.
description_long:
Los Angeles LDC Inc is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Inglewood, California. The company serves consumers in the Inglewood area who are looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a non-profit organization, consultant, Los Angeles LDC Inc provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Inglewood offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Los Angeles LDC Inc provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Inglewood, California area who are considering Los Angeles LDC Inc should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
